summary: Executive Dashboard Multi-Normativa testing completed. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly - page loads, KPI cards visible, 3 sector sections (EN_1090, EN_13241, GENERICA), scadenze alert with red/amber colors, MISTA badge on multi-normativa commesse, click navigation to CommessaHub, sidebar navigation working.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: NF-2026-000036 (mista commessa with EN_1090, EN_13241, GENERICA voci_lavoro)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executive Dashboard fully tested. The endpoint GET /api/dashboard/executive aggregates commesse by normativa_tipo from voci_lavoro. Mista commesse appear in multiple sectors. Scadenze include patentini, tarature, and ITT within 30 days. Frontend shows KPI cards, 3 sector sections with tables, MISTA badges, and scadenze alert with color-coded urgency.

coverage: Response structure validation (settori, scadenze_imminenti, totale_commesse, totale_valore)

GENERICA sector: efficienza_produttiva instead of audit fields

Commessa card fields (commessa_id, numero, title, stato, value, deadline, days_left, prod_done, prod_total, audit)
Audit data structure (riesame_ok, riesame_pct, ispezioni_ok, controllo_ok, dop_count)
